cli.noAdminWarning: You are not running SRA-cli with administrative privileges. Some commands may not work as expected.
cli.invalidArguments: Invalid arguments for command '{command}'. Type 'help {command}' for usage.
cli.defaultError: {} is not a recognized command, alias, or macro.
cli.task.timeout: Timeout reached while waiting for tasks to complete.
cli.task.stopped: All running tasks have been stopped.
cli.trigger.attrSet: Attribute '{attr}' of trigger '{trigger_name}' has been set to '{value}'.
argparse.description: SRA-cli: A command-line interface for SRA.
argparse.version_help: Show the version of SRA-cli and exit.
task.description: Task manager - Manages tasks for SRA-cli.
task.noSelectedTasks: No task is selected in {config_name}, skipping execution.
task.taskCrashed: Task '{name}' crashed due to an unexpected error: {error}
task.configCompleted: All tasks in config '{config_name}' have been completed.
task.managerCrashed: Task manager crashed due to an unexpected error: {error}
run.description: Run all selected tasks in specified configuration file(s). Type 'run --help' for more information.
single.description: Run a single task specified by its name or index. Type 'single --help' for more information.
single.taskHelp: Name or index of the task to run.
trigger.description: Trigger manager - Manages triggers for SRA-cli.
trigger.disable.nameHelp: Name of the trigger to disable.
trigger.enable.nameHelp: Name of the trigger to enable.
trigger.set.description: Set the attribute of a trigger.
trigger.set.nameHelp: Name of the trigger to set the attribute of.
trigger.set.attrHelp: Name of the attribute to set.
trigger.set.typeHelp: Type of the attribute to set.
trigger.set.valueHelp: Value of the attribute to set.
config.exception: An error occurred while loading config file '{path}': {error}
